title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
